title: limonium anfractum
intro: Limonium anfractum, also known as Fringed Sea Lavender or Fringed Orchilla, is a flowering plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm irritated tissues, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Limonium anfractum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area or consumed internally to promote overall well-being.
